assignments.name: Assign_Asset_Name_Input_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Asset Name Input To Variable

assignments.name: Build_Variables_For_Assemblies_To_Link
assignments.label: Build Variables For Assemblies To Link

assignments.name: Build_Variables_For_Assets_To_Link
assignments.label: Build Variables For Assets To Link

assignments.name: Build_Variables_For_Contracts_To_Link
assignments.label: Build Variables For Contracts To Link

assignments.description: Reset values from datatable selections and buttons to the state that they were in when the flow started running.
assignments.name: Reset_Flow_Values
assignments.label: Reset Flow Values

decisions.description: Choose path to take based on the button clicked on the Asset / Assembly Selection Screen
decisions.name: Link_OR_Remove_Records
decisions.label: Link OR Remove Records?

Flow.description: A console for multi-attaching Assets and Assemblies to a Ticket

formulas.name: f_AssembliesQuery
formulas.expression:
IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Assembly_Name_And_Type__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c " & "LIMIT 4",
"SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Type__c, pro_Assembly_Name_And_Type__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c " & "WHERE Name LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "OR leaseworks__Asset__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "OR leaseworks__Attached_Aircraft__r.leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' " & "LIMIT 4" )

formulas.name: f_AssetsQuery
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c, leaseworks__MSN_Number__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c LIMIT 4", "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Asset_Type_GP__c, leaseworks__MSN_Number__c FROM leaseworks__Aircraft__c WHERE leaseworks__MSN_Number__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number} & "%' LIMIT 4" )

formulas.name: f_AttachedContractsOrPlaceholder
formulas.expression: IF({!Create_Contract_On_Ticket_Name_Collection} != Null, SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE({!Create_Contract_On_Ticket_Name_Collection}, "[", ""), "]", ""), ",", ", "), "No Contracts on Ticket" )

formulas.name: f_ContractsQuery
formulas.expression: IF( ISBLANK({!Serial_Number_Contract}), "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Lease_Type_Status__c FROM leaseworks__Lease__c LIMIT 8", "SELECT Id, Name, leaseworks__Lease_Type_Status__c " & "FROM leaseworks__Lease__c " & "WHERE pro_Asset_Name__c LIKE '" & {!Serial_Number_Contract} & "%' " & "LIMIT 8" )

Flow.label: Prodigy - Screen - Ticket Multi-Attach Console

fields.name: AddAssetsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Enter a serial number to search for any Asset or Assembly. Select the desired Assets or Assemblies in the datatables and click the button Add.

fields.name: RemoveAssetsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Select the desired Assets or Assemblies from the datatables then click Remove

fields.name: AddContractsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Enter a serial number to search for any Contract. Select the desired Contracts in the datatable and click the button Add.

fields.name: RemoveContractsInstructionText
fields.fieldText: Select the desired Contracts from the datatable then click Remove

fields.name: ErrorDisplay
fields.fieldText:
There was an error processing your request:


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

subflows.name: Update_Assets_and_Assemblies_Fields_On_Ticket
subflows.label: Update Assets and Assemblies Fields On Ticket

transforms.name: Create_Assembly_On_Ticket_Name_Collection
transforms.label: Create Assembly On Ticket Name Collection

transforms.name: Create_Asset_On_Ticket_Name_Collection
transforms.label: Create Asset On Ticket Name Collection

transforms.name: Create_Contract_On_Ticket_Name_Collection
transforms.label: Create Contract On Ticket Name Collection
